summary: Tested DanceTrack backend (14 pytest cases) and frontend (Expo web mobile viewport). Backend 14/14 passed. Frontend login→workspace-select→tab navigation all working. No red-screen errors, no JS console errors.
action_items: (Advisory) Expo warnings: shadow* style props deprecated (use boxShadow); async-storage@3.0.2 / expo-image-picker@55 / expo-secure-store@55 versions don't match expected Expo SDK versions (2.2.0 / ~17.0.10 / ~15.0.8). Non-blocking but may cause native build issues.
(Advisory) Ngrok tunnel start failed in logs ('failed to start tunnel'); web preview works via direct URL but Expo Go tunnel/QR may not. Not blocking web testing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 397-399: level-up detection uses sorted-desc list with `threshold <= count` next(); works but if thresholds are not unique or new custom level added between existing, compare by id works only because list is re-fetched each call — acceptable.
server.py line 391: student fetched by id only (no workspaceId filter) in attendance loop — minor isolation risk if student ids were shared across workspaces (UUIDs make it effectively safe).

Attendance POST does not validate that provided student IDs belong to the given groupId/workspace; a malicious trainer with workspace access could increment levels of any student by id. Low priority but worth hardening.
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentials in this combo; fine for Bearer-token mobile app.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /auth/login. Playbook mentions 5-fail lockout — not implemented. Flagging for product decision.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed workspace/groups/students/lessons/sessions and clean up workspace (cascade) in fixture teardown. Demo user auto-seeded by backend startup verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testIDs: login page uses email-input / password-input / submit-btn (not login-*). Workspace cards: workspace-<id>, delete-ws-<id>, create-workspace-btn, ws-name-input, ws-trainer-input, ws-create-submit. Tab bar: tab-overview, tab-groups, tab-students, tab-attendance, tab-registrations, tab-work-hours, tab-trainer-hours, tab-awards, tab-settings. Header: switch-workspace-btn, bell-btn, logout-btn. Demo workspace 'sugarshock' is pre-populated with 1 group 'Sugarshock Minis' on Friday 15:00. Next agent should deep-test CRUD flows in groups/students/attendance tabs and verify level-up toast + bell badge behavior.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found during this iteration.
